case_title: LINDA JOYCE FOUNTAINE-CISCO ET AL VS. ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-20-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOUNTAINE-CISCO, LINDA JOYCE CISCO, SPENCER CISCO, KEANDRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FOUNTAINE-CISCO, LINDA JOYCE CISCO, SPENCER CISCO, KEANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOUNTAINE-CISCO, LINDA JOYCE CISCO, SPENCER CISCO, KEANDRA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CISCO, SPENCER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOUNTAINE-CISCO, LINDA JOYCE CISCO, SPENCER CISCO, KEANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (3) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RAY CASHMAN--OWNER. NO COST, IFP FILED BY ALL PLAINTIFFS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
